titleStmt.title: SII 37.359B: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 359B. (A.R. No. B 2 of 1941-42.) Appikoṇḍa, Visakhapatnam Taluk and District.

summary.p: Pillar in the temple of Veṅkaṭēśvarasvāmi.
This is dated Śaka 1550, Vibhava, Jyēshṭhā śu. 15, Friday, corresponding to 1628 A.D., June 6.

It records the foundation of certain temples at Kaikalūru alias Kaiṅkaryapura and gifts of lands made to them and their establishments by Khaṇḍērāya of the Kūḍalge family, who was a Madhva of the Kāṇva-śākhā.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī sakavaruṣaṁbulu
1053 kogunēṇḍu svasti sama
dhigata paṁcamahāśabda mahā
sāmaṁtādhipati mahāpracaṇḍa
daṁḍanāyaka vayirībharuṇḍaka
sujanajanakumudavana sudhākara
vipradivākara Abhimānamaṁdara vi
bhavapuraṁdaragōtra pavitra parāṁga
nāputraharacaraṇasarasīruhabhriṁ
ga māmana siṁga vidvajjanōdyānakē
līvasaṁta sakalalakṣmīkāṁta nāmā
di samasta praśasti sahitaṁ śrīma
nmahāpradhānaṁ daṁḍanāyakaṁ Anna
rājula pradhānaṁ paṁpavāditūrppaṁdma
bhūmiki viśākhapaṭtanakuṁ sama
stādhikāri samasta sēnādhipati mā

ci mayya daṁḍanāyakuṁlu
sēnāpati mārttaṇḍayya
nāyaṁkulu śrīmaccā
ḷukya vikramavaruṣambu
55 nagu sādhāraṇa saṁvatsaraṇa pālgu
na bahuḷa 11 budhavāramunāṁḍu
daṁtivāramu lōpali śrīsōmēśvaradē
varadēvabhōgapuŪru Appikoṁḍaku
ṁbūvvamaryyādana grāmagrāsama
Ī dēvara Amudunaku dēvara
kunavārunuṁḍayi dharmmamunaku

vighnamudalaṁcinavārupa ṁ
camahāpātakamunaṁba
ḍuduru yi dharmuvusitamaṇḍa
naḍapinavāri śrīpādamulu
nā śirassunavi
Digital edition of SII 37.359B by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
